STATUS: AVAILABLE FOR INTERNSHIPS

Building Secure
AI Systems

2nd year BS student at IIT Patna specializing in Artificial Intelligence & Cybersecurity. Passionate about decentralized systems, machine learning, and building software that scales.

ACCESS LOGS INITIATE COMMS

EXPLORE OPEN SOURCE

Check out my latest AI models, cybersecurity scripts, and public repository contributions.

VIEW GITHUB

VIDEO ENGINEERING LOGS

Follow my journey on YouTube where I document my learning process in AI and infosec.

WATCH VIDEOS

Identity Core

Who I Am

I'm Mayank Raj, a second-year BS student at IIT Patna pursuing Artificial Intelligence & Cybersecurity. With a 9.53 CGPA, I focus on the practical application of algorithms and secure system design.

Before university, I led a technical team in Nepal for two years, managing full project lifecycles, and contributed to community-building at Rotary's Interact Club. This taught me that scalable technology is built on strong team communication.

I also spent time as a Social Media Manager at Orgazz Enterprises, where I gained experience in UI/UX and visual communication—skills that help me bridge the gap between backend logic and frontend user experience.

🎓
IIT Patna · Lvl 2BS in AI & Cybersecurity · CGPA 9.53/10
🛡️
Cybersecurity ClassDeloitte Forage certified · Secure architecture
🧠
AI & ML SpecHCL GUVI certified · Data modeling
🌐
Global MindsetCross-cultural technical leadership

Quest Log

Experience

SEP 2025 – FEB 2026
Digital Media Manager
Orgazz Enterprises LLP · Noida, India
  • Led development of the company's e-commerce website and integrated graphic design assets.
  • Applied data-driven marketing metrics to scale the startup's online presence.
  • Managed multi-platform content delivery and engagement strategies.
SEP 2020 – SEP 2022
Technical Team Lead
The Gream Project · Nepal
  • Managed end-to-end software lifecycles using agile methodologies.
  • Directed cross-functional teams to deploy multiple successful initiatives over 24 months.
FEB 2020 – FEB 2022
Technical Support Specialist
Interact (Rotary Club) · Nepal
  • Handled technical infrastructure for community events and outreach programs.
  • Provided IT support and streamlined communication channels for volunteers.

Active Loadouts

Selected Projects

T-MINUS: MAY 2026
Lifelong Medical Records Ledger (LMRL)
A decentralized health data framework built for India using secure ledger technology. Focused on data privacy, patient accessibility, and tamper-resistant architecture.
View Details →
DECEMBER 2025
Illegal Logging Detection Model
A machine learning pipeline that ingests satellite imagery arrays to identify unregulated geographical logging practices using computer vision algorithms.
View Repository →
